reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to identify the user and return their GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260415-220629-6cj5" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator showed "idle", which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message was submitted successfully, creating a new session called "GitHub Username Verification Check"
Waited for agent response while monitoring for account access request - Agent worked through multiple steps: attempted gh CLI, found no connected accounts, and requested GitHub access
Granted GitHub account access when the Account Access Request card appeared - Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant the connected GitHub account
Approved the API request when the API Request Review card appeared - Clicked "Allow Once" to permit the GET /user request to GitHub
Waited for final response - Agent completed successfully after 42 seconds (well within the 4-minute limit)
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with a "Worked for 42s" completion message
Took screenshot of final result - Full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation flow and the GitHub username response
